features.Key Features:: For Sony E Mount | Full-Frame | f/1.8 to f/16 | Fast Aperture Everyday Prime | STM Stepping Motor | Two Aspherical Lens Elements | Multlayer Coatings | 11-Blade Diaphragm | AF/MF Mode Switch | USB Port for Firmware Upgrades | Filter Size : 62mm
